message.content:
In D:/cursor-projects/oa/oa-all/oa-server, find how the existing AI/OpenAI chat is called. Look at:
1. Any service class that calls an external AI API (search for "stream", "curl", "GuzzleHttp", "Http::", "openai" in app/ directory)
2. The ChatServiceImpl or similar service that handles AI streaming
3. How HTTP requests are made to external APIs in this project

Return the key code snippets showing what HTTP client/library is used and how streaming requests are made.
